nasb.text: He took the calf which they had made and burned it with fire, and ground it to powder, and scattered it over the surface of the water and made the sons of Israel drink it.

esv.text: He took the calf that they had made and burned it with fire and ground it to powder and scattered it on the water and made the people of Israel drink it.

cnv.text: 又把他們所做的那牛犢拿過來，用火焚燒，磨到粉碎，撒在水面上，讓以色列人喝。

ccb.text: 又把他们铸造的牛犊熔化掉，磨成粉末撒在水面上，叫以色列百姓喝。
